2603.23375.title: Natural Language Interfaces for Spatial and Temporal Databases: A Comprehensive Overview of Methods, Taxonomy, and Future Directions
2603.23375.paper_summary: The task of building a natural language interface to a database, known as NLIDB, has recently gained significant attention from both the database and Natural Language Processing (NLP) communities. With the proliferation of geospatial datasets driven by the rapid emergence of location-aware sensors, geospatial databases play a vital role in supporting geospatial applications. However, querying geospatial and temporal databases differs substantially from querying traditional relational databases due to the presence of geospatial topological operators and temporal operators. To bridge the gap between geospatial query languages and non-expert users, the geospatial research community has increasingly focused on developing NLIDBs for geospatial databases. Yet, existing research remains fragmented across systems, datasets, and methodological choices, making it difficult to clearly understand the landscape of existing methods, their strengths and weaknesses, and opportunities for future research. Existing surveys on NLIDBs focus on general-purpose database systems and do not treat geospatial and temporal databases as primary focus for analysis. To address this gap, this paper presents a comprehensive survey of studies on NLIDBs for geospatial and temporal databases. Specifically, we provide a detailed overview of datasets, evaluation metrics, and the taxonomy of the methods for geospatial and temporal NLIDBs, as well as a comparative analysis of the existing methods. Our survey reveals recurring trends in existing methods, substantial variation in datasets and evaluation practices, and several open challenges that continue to hinder progress in this area. Based on these findings, we identify promising directions for future research to advance natural language interfaces to geospatial and temporal databases.
2603.23375.paper_summary_zh: 建立自然語言介面到資料庫的任務，稱為 NLIDB，最近引起了資料庫和自然語言處理（NLP）社群的重大關注。<lb/>隨著由於位置感知感測器的快速出現而驅動的地理空間數據集的增長，地理空間資料庫在支持地理空間應用中扮演著至關重要的角色。<lb/>然而，由於存在地理空間拓撲運算子和時間運算子，查詢地理空間和時間資料庫與查詢傳統關聯資料庫有著實質性的不同。<lb/>為了彌合地理空間查詢語言與非專家用戶之間的差距，地理空間研究社群越來越專注於為地理空間資料庫開發 NLIDB。<lb/>然而，現有的研究在系統、數據集和方法選擇上仍然是支離破碎的，這使得清晰理解現有方法的全貌、其優缺點及未來研究機會變得困難。<lb/>現有的 NLIDB 調查專注於通用資料庫系統，並未將地理空間和時間資料庫作為分析的主要焦點。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，本文提供了對地理空間和時間資料庫的 NLIDB 研究的全面調查。<lb/>具體而言，我們提供了地理空間和時間 NLIDB 的數據集、評估指標和方法分類的詳細概述，以及對現有方法的比較分析。<lb/>我們的調查揭示了現有方法中的重複趨勢、數據集和評估實踐的顯著變異，以及幾個持續阻礙該領域進展的開放挑戰。<lb/>根據這些發現，我們確定了未來研究的有前景方向，以促進自然語言介面與地理空間和時間資料庫的進步。
2603.23375.author: Samya Acharja et.al.
